Test Case Scenario: User navigates to sign in form
Action: Tap/click the Sign In button from the welcome screen

Test Case Scenario: User logs in with valid credentials
Action: Enter email and password, tap Login

Test Case Scenario: User logs in with invalid credentials
User logs out of the system
User requests a password reset link
Action: Enter registered email, tap Send Reset Link

Test Case Scenario: User resets password via emailed link
Action: Open reset link, enter new password + confirmation
Open verification link sent to email

Test Case Scenario: User confirms password before sensitive action

Action: Edit name/email on profile page, tap Save
Enter current + new password, tap Update
Confirm with password, tap Delete Account
Open Users page from admin menu

Test Case Scenario: Admin creates a new staff user
Action: Fill create-user form, assign role + department, Save
Open user, change details, tap Update
Toggle the Active switch on a user

Test Case Scenario: System generates a QR tracking number

Action: Open document, edit fields, tap Update
Tap Print Sticker on a document

Test Case Scenario: Staff marks a document as complete
Action: Tap Mark Complete on a document

Test Case Scenario: Staff uploads an attachment to a document

Action: Scan QR / enter tracking number, action = IN
Scan QR, action = OUT, route to next department
Tap Undo Last Scan on a document
Choose file on tracking page, tap Upload

Test Case Scenario: Citizen asks a question about their document
Staff marks a notification as read
